seo.title: Orchestrator Core
seo.description: Central control point for architectural contracts, FSD standards, and project constraints enforcement

hero.title: Orchestrator v1
hero.subtitle: Orchestration Core
hero.mission: Establishing the definitive source of truth for architectural contracts. This module serves as the central control point for the project's architectural integrity. It guarantees that all code changes, integrations, and new functional modules strictly comply with Feature-Sliced Design (FSD) standards and corporate agreements on naming, layer structure, and dependencies.
hero.summary: Orchestration Core unifies all critical project orchestration logic: analysis, strict verification, constraint enforcement, and module approval. It ensures stability and consistency even in large-scale projects with many developers and integrations.

cards.title: Specialized orchestration layer
cards.description: Connects business logic, UI, and APIs into a single managed tier.

cards.title: Authoritative source of truth
cards.description: The single entry point for all project contracts and architectural rules.

cards.title: Architectural contract enforcement
cards.description: Guaranteed consistency and Feature-Sliced Design isolation.

items.title: Determinism
items.description: Predictable results on every validation run.

items.title: Explicit Rules
items.description: Rejection of implicit behavior in favor of strict configurations.

items.title: No Magic
items.description: Transparent architecture where every dependency is traceable.

items.title: Validation > Generation
items.description: Controlling existing structures takes priority over unsupervised generation.
